title.en: Of course, he didn't want to expose himself eit...

content.en:
The Six Shadow Realm Lords didn't dare to track it down, and they would treat it as if this matter didn't exist.

But many of the Fourth Realms were a little panicked, after all, there were so many Fourth Realms on the side of the Fifth Thousand Territory, and most of them had left the Fifth Thousand Territory, and the Fourth Realm stationed in the Fifth Thousand Territory would not exceed a hundred.

But now, in a short period of time, three Fourth Realms have fallen one after another, which is not a small number.

The point is that they don't know who killed these three Fourth Realms, and they want to deduce a little trace, but they can't.

Ye Tian had cultivated the Great Realm Armor Technique to the fourth layer, and the fifth realm could not deduce his traces, and he erased the traces of his own killing of the Blazing Sun Realm Lord, plus there was no fourth realm on the side of the Six Thousand Realm, they were all some weak extra-dimensional realms, and they couldn't spy on the original battle, so they naturally didn't know what happened.

Therefore, Ye Tianzhuo "817" root is not afraid that these Fourth Realms will track him down.

Besides, even if he finds out, with his current strength, he is definitely an invincible existence on the side of the Five Thousand Territory.

Of course, he didn't want to expose himself either.

There is no fourth realm on the side of the 5,000 territory, but there is a fifth realm on the 4,000 territory, in case a certain fourth realm finds the fifth realm as a backer, so it is better to be careful.

......

"Hahahaha, that's right, with the assistance of the essence of the Four Realms Multidimensional Rules, my Extra-Dimensional Rules realm has improved much faster, according to this efficiency, within a thousand extra-dimensional eras, I should have the hope of raising the extra-dimensional rules to two hundred!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Raising the extra-dimensional rules to two hundred Dao is already very fast, you must know that the Blazing Sun Realm Lord's super-dimensional rule realm is also around three hundred, which is estimated to be the effect of using the essence of multi-dimensional rules to improve, but even so, it is extremely difficult to raise the super-dimensional rules.

For example, the multi-dimensional rule treasure bottle in Ye Tian's hand, even if he killed multiple Fourth Realms and used it to cultivate the essence of the multi-dimensional rules of the Four Realms, and with the assistance of multi-dimensional wisdom light, soul treasure bottle and other means, it would be very good to be able to raise it to six or seven hundred extra-dimensional rules.

It is absolutely extremely difficult to comprehend a thousand extradimensional rules and elevate the realm of extradimensional rules to the realm of Xiaocheng.

Of course, it is also because there are few chance treasures on the side of the 5000th Territory, which makes it difficult to improve.

Even the multi-dimensional treasure bottle is not very useful nowadays.

However, Ye Tian didn't want to go to the 4000 Territory for the time being, he was going to go to the 4000 Territory after cultivating the Great Realm Armor Technique to the fifth layer.

After all, the fourth-layer Great Realm Armor Technique could only make it difficult for the Fifth Realm to spy on his traces, but if it was the most demonic Fifth Realm, holding an innate multi-dimensional treasure that could be traced and deduced, it would be expected to track him.

Therefore, he must be safer, as long as he cultivates the Great Realm Armor Technique to the highest realm of the fifth layer, it will be difficult for the sixth realm to track and spy on his traces, so it can be regarded as insurance.

"Soon, at most 2,000 extradimensional eras, I can cultivate the Great Realm Armor Technique to the fifth layer of the highest realm!"

Ye Tian said confidently.

And when the time comes, his strength will skyrocket, reaching an incredible level.

Before you know it, a thousand extradimensional epochs have passed.

At this time.

The human race gave birth to a large number of second realms, and even some of the third realms were born, all of which were his relatives, and with his full help, he could naturally quickly comprehend the rules of the extradimensional dimension, as well as quickly improve his cultivation.

After all, he now has several multi-dimensional treasure bottles, and there are multi-dimensional refining essences, multi-dimensional rule essences, and even multi-dimensional healing essences, so he can naturally accumulate some third realms in a short period of time.

It's just that from the third realm to the fourth realm, this step is more difficult, even if it is a multidimensional treasure bottle, it is difficult to cultivate.

There are many third realms of the human race, and the territory of the 6000 naturally feels barren.

Even though the Terrans occupy a lot of extradimensional territory, the resources are still insufficient.

"In the past 1,000 extradimensional eras, I will let the human race settle in the 5,000 Territory and occupy several extradimensional territories. "

Ye Tian decided.

This is when the strength is strong, there are fewer worries.

Now, his soul will has been raised to the level of almost the eighth dimension, and it is estimated that in a few hundred extradimensional epochs, he will almost break through.

And he also perfected the three-realm multi-dimensional mastery of sand and gravel robbery to the four-realm multi-dimensional mastery, which also took him most of the time to do.

The Sanwu secret method has also been cultivated by him to the second layer of Xiaocheng realm, as for the wisdom body of the Ka Ye has been cultivated by him to the second layer of the Dacheng realm, the body of the black mother is still in the realm of the second layer of the first entry, but it is not far from the second layer of Xiaocheng.....

The main reason is that the resources are insufficient, and he needs to improve too many aspects, which leads to some aspects that cannot be improved quickly.

But as long as he is given enough time, he will be raised to an extremely high level in all aspects.

"Cultivation is still in the early stage of the fourth realm, so you have to kill a few more fourth realms, otherwise there are not enough four realms to repair and refine the essence, and your cultivation will not be able to improve quickly. "

Ye Tian muttered.

Although the small realm of the fourth realm does not have much to improve the strength, it can have a great impact on the combat staying power, if the cultivation is promoted to the middle or late realm of the fourth realm, he can break out the multi-dimensional mastery of the four realms as he wants, otherwise he will be exhausted after ten or so times, resulting in a great reduction in combat effectiveness, which will not be good.

"There are not many fourth realms in the territory of the fifth thousand, who will you kill?"

The Dragon Wolf Realm Lord and the Blazing Sun Realm Lord both had enmity with him and wanted to kill him, so he killed them.

If he indiscriminately killed the Fourth Realm of the Five Thousand Realms, if he offended a certain Fifth Realm, it would be more than worth the loss.

So, he was looking for the right target.

Soon, he had a goal.

【Fourth Extradimensional Creature-Black Kite】

The Black Kite Realm Lord is a huge black giant bird with a very large body, a powerful extradimensional bloodline, but very tyrannical, likes to devour all kinds of creatures, and once swallowed 1.7 creatures of an extradimensional territory in one go.

However, due to its strength, the top fourth realm can't help it.

The most important thing is that its speed is too fast, it can be called the first extreme speed of the fourth realm, and the top fourth realm can't catch up with it.

Therefore, no Fourth Realm dared to deal with this Black Kite Realm Lord.

"It's extremely fast, but no matter how fast it is, it's not as fast as the seventh dimension will mastery!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

He has already decided, and he will deal with the Black Kite Realm Lord.

Moreover, the Black Kite Realm Lord is a super-dimensional creature, with a huge body and a strong physical body, such a super-dimensional creature is refined by the multi-dimensional treasure bottle, and can refine more four-dimensional multi-cultivation refining essences.

Unless a cultivator is looking for death and offends him, his target is still these extradimensional creatures, so it is the most cost-effective.
